examples: He put on his best suit for the wedding
The princess donned a long blue dress
The queen assumed the stately robes
She put on a sun room

meanings.definition: put on the stove or ready for cooking

examples: They turned in a splendid effort
They turned in top jobs for the second straight game
He put on 1,000 miles on this trip

meanings.definition: prepare and supply with the necessary equipment for execution or performance

examples: She applied paint to the back of the house
The immigrant was duped because he trusted everyone
She gained 20 pounds when she stopped exercising
